root_text.an5.173:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato upāsako yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.173:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato upāsako yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.173:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato upāsako yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an5.173:2.3: Pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti …pe… surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā paṭivirato hoti.
root_text.an5.173:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato upāsako yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an5.173:1.1: “Mendicants, a lay follower with five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.173:1.3: They kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, lie, and consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an5.173:1.4: A lay follower with these five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.173:2.1: A lay follower with five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.173:2.3: They don’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, lie, or consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an5.173:2.4: A lay follower with these five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
